summary: ForJenta IDE Inworld AI integration verified. All critical features working: /api/generate and /api/provider/status endpoints operational (no auth required), model picker shows 'Inworld — Inworld AI', terminal logs show provider validation and stage-by-stage progress, localStorage persistence working, generation uses new /api/generate endpoint (not legacy), continuation with fileTree works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: New /api/generate endpoint correctly accepts full contract (rootPrompt, followUpPrompt, fileTree, buildHistory)
/api/provider/status correctly returns Inworld provider details without auth
generationOrchestrator.ts has retry logic (MAX_RETRIES=2) and 150s timeout
workspaceStore.ts uses orchestrator for all generation calls, not direct fetch
Model picker shows correct label from selectedModel.providerLabel + modelLabel
Terminal logs show provider status on init ('Inworld AI provider: available')
Error cards show structured error codes via message.errorCode
No 'local mode' or 'Claude Opus' references remain in UI

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed - 12 existing + 2 new provider status tests)

seed_data_creation: Used existing project with prompts and generated files
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Inworld AI integration features working. Generation takes 5-30s. /api/generate endpoint accepts full contract. Provider status endpoint at /api/provider/status returns config without auth. Terminal shows provider validation on project init.
